text:

unified diff of contrib/dma

Small update on top of bug #244630.

Upstream does rarely make a release but it does do bugfixes.
DragonflyBSD also imported this: https://lists.dragonflybsd.org/pipermail/commits/2021-May/820180.html

Compiles and runs on aarch64/14-CURRENT.
